data.name: Jebel Ali UAE
data.notes: Largest Middle East port. US Navy transit hub.

data.name: Colombo Port
data.notes: China Merchants 85% stake new terminal. Indian Ocean hub. India concern.

data.name: Hambantota Port
data.notes: Sri Lanka debt-for-equity. 99yr lease CHEC. Near sea lanes. Debt trap precedent.

data.name: Gwadar Port
data.notes: China Overseas Port Holdings. CPEC endpoint. 40km from Iran border.

data.name: Piraeus Port
data.notes: COSCO 67% stake. China EU gateway. Greece NATO ally. Congressional concern.

data.name: Djibouti Doraleh
data.notes: China-operated. Adjacent Chinese PLA base and US Camp Lemonnier.

data.name: Mombasa Port
data.notes: China Exim Bank financed SGR railway inland. Debt leverage.

data.name: Ream Port Cambodia
data.notes: Adjacent new PLA naval base. Gulf of Thailand position.
